industries.name: Oil & Gas
industries.description: CLIVO provides rugged solenoid valves and actuators for upstream and downstream oil & gas operations.

industries.name: Power Generation Station
industries.description: Our control valves are applied in containment sampling systems, emergency core cooling systems, and more.

industries.name: Food & Beverages
industries.description: Solenoid valves from CLIVO regulate various food processing equipment with precision and hygiene.

industries.name: Chemical & Pharmaceuticals
industries.description: CLIVO provides stainless steel robust solenoid valves for highly corrosive environments.

industries.name: Marine
industries.description: Directional control valves applied in marine applications including engine room automation.

industries.name: Irrigation
industries.description: Our solenoid valves electromagnetically regulate the flow of water for efficient irrigation.
